summary: A montage set to music about the Presidential Fitness Test, shot on the White House South Lawn with the Washington Monument behind. Slow-motion shots show teens in 'Presidential Fitness Test' shirts doing pushups, a coach dribbling a basketball, and a diving soccer save, intercut with Trump fist-bumping and mock-boxing with the participants. Audio includes 'Class is in session... boom, boom, boom... good job' over a music bed.

script.scene: Low-angle slow-motion: a man in a suit dribbles a basketball across the South Lawn while a line of teens in matching navy 'Presidential Fitness Test' shirts watches; the Washington Monument is in the background under blue sky. Music bed; voice: 'Class is in session.'

Wide shot of the White House lawn: Trump and an official in suits stand talking as a row of youth participants do pushups in the grass; aides and Secret Service look on. Voice: 'Okay, so what we're gonna do...'
Slow-motion at a soccer goal: a coach in a blue shirt dives across the frame as a red-white-and-blue ball flies toward the net, trees and balustrade behind. Music.
Trump, flanked by a coach and a woman in white plus a DHS/agency-shirted staffer, points and gestures toward the activity; people in the crowd point along. Voice: 'That's how you do it.'
Trump stands in a circle of teen athletes in navy shirts, fists up, mock-boxing with them on the sunlit lawn; participants are laughing. Voice: 'Good job.' Music to close.

notable_text: CLASS IS IN SESSION; THE PRESIDENTIAL FITNESS TEST IS BACK!; on-shirt text 'PRESIDENTIAL FITNESS TEST'
